testcase.name: test_timestamps_are_iso8601_utc

skipped.message: No timestamps found in responses to validate

testcase.skipped: D:\github\a2aproject\a2a-tck\tests\compatibility\core_operations\test_data_model.py:280: No timestamps found in responses to validate

testcase.name: test_unsupported_version_returns_error_rest

failure.message: AssertionError: VER-SERVER-002 [Agent returns VersionNotSupportedError for unsupported version] failed on http_json: Expected error for unsupported version, got 200 (see specification/specification.md#362-server-responsibilities)

testcase.failure: tests\compatibility\core_operations\test_error_handling.py:373: in test_unsupported_version_returns_error_rest assert_and_record(compatibility_collector, req, transport, errors) tests\compatibility\_test_helpers.py:59: in assert_and_record assert passed, fail_msg(req, transport, "; ".join(errors)) ^^^^^^ E AssertionError: VER-SERVER-002 [Agent returns VersionNotSupportedError for unsupported version] failed on http_json: Expected error for unsupported version, got 200 (see specification/specification.md#362-server-responsibilities)

testcase.name: test_error_uses_aip193_format

failure.message: AssertionError: HTTP_JSON-ERR-001 [Error responses use AIP-193 format] failed on http_json: AIP-193 error response must include 'error' object (see specification/specification.md#116-error-handling)

testcase.failure: tests\compatibility\core_operations\test_error_handling.py:565: in test_error_uses_aip193_format assert_and_record(compatibility_collector, req, transport, errors) tests\compatibility\_test_helpers.py:59: in assert_and_record assert passed, fail_msg(req, transport, "; ".join(errors)) ^^^^^^ E AssertionError: HTTP_JSON-ERR-001 [Error responses use AIP-193 format] failed on http_json: AIP-193 error response must include 'error' object (see specification/specification.md#116-error-handling)

testcase.name: test_must_requirement[CORE-SEND-002-jsonrpc]

failure.message: AssertionError: CORE-SEND-002 [SendMessage rejects messages to terminal tasks] failed on jsonrpc: Expected error code -32004 (UnsupportedOperationError), got -32001 (see specification/specification.md#311-send-message) assert not ['Expected error code -32004 (UnsupportedOperationError), got -32001']

testcase.failure: tests\compatibility\core_operations\test_requirements.py:190: in test_must_requirement assert not errors, _format_failure(requirement, transport, errors) E AssertionError: CORE-SEND-002 [SendMessage rejects messages to terminal tasks] failed on jsonrpc: Expected error code -32004 (UnsupportedOperationError), got -32001 (see specification/specification.md#311-send-message) E assert not ['Expected error code -32004 (UnsupportedOperationError), got -32001']

testcase.name: test_must_requirement[CORE-SEND-002-http_json]

failure.message: AssertionError: CORE-SEND-002 [SendMessage rejects messages to terminal tasks] failed on http_json: Expected error code 400 (UnsupportedOperationError), got 404 (see specification/specification.md#311-send-message) assert not ['Expected error code 400 (UnsupportedOperationError), got 404']

testcase.failure: tests\compatibility\core_operations\test_requirements.py:190: in test_must_requirement assert not errors, _format_failure(requirement, transport, errors) E AssertionError: CORE-SEND-002 [SendMessage rejects messages to terminal tasks] failed on http_json: Expected error code 400 (UnsupportedOperationError), got 404 (see specification/specification.md#311-send-message) E assert not ['Expected error code 400 (UnsupportedOperationError), got 404']

testcase.name: test_must_requirement[STREAM-SUB-004-http_json]
testcase.failure: tests\compatibility\core_operations\test_requirements.py:180: in test_must_requirement errors = _validate_response(response, transport, requirement, validators) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests\compatibility\core_operations\test_requirements.py:101: in _validate_response return validate_expected_error(response, transport, requirement.expected_error) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tck\validators\error_binding.py:38: in validate_expected_error return _validate_from_stream(response, transport, expected) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tck\validators\error_binding.py:88: in _validate_from_stream actual_code = first_event["error"].get("code") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'get'

testcase.name: test_must_requirement[CARD-EXT-001-jsonrpc]

failure.message: AssertionError: CARD-EXT-001 [Extended Agent Card requires authentication] failed on jsonrpc: Operation failed: Authentication required for extended agent card. (see specification/specification.md#3111-get-extended-agent-card) assert not ['Operation failed: Authentication required for extended agent card.']

testcase.failure: tests\compatibility\core_operations\test_requirements.py:190: in test_must_requirement assert not errors, _format_failure(requirement, transport, errors) E AssertionError: CARD-EXT-001 [Extended Agent Card requires authentication] failed on jsonrpc: Operation failed: Authentication required for extended agent card. (see specification/specification.md#3111-get-extended-agent-card) E assert not ['Operation failed: Authentication required for extended agent card.']

testcase.name: test_must_requirement[CARD-EXT-001-http_json]

failure.message: AssertionError: CARD-EXT-001 [Extended Agent Card requires authentication] failed on http_json: Operation failed: [401] (see specification/specification.md#3111-get-extended-agent-card) assert not ['Operation failed: [401] ']

testcase.failure: tests\compatibility\core_operations\test_requirements.py:190: in test_must_requirement assert not errors, _format_failure(requirement, transport, errors) E AssertionError: CARD-EXT-001 [Extended Agent Card requires authentication] failed on http_json: Operation failed: [401] (see specification/specification.md#3111-get-extended-agent-card) E assert not ['Operation failed: [401] ']

failure.message: AssertionError: CARD-EXT-002 [Extended card not configured returns specific error] failed on jsonrpc: Operation failed: Authentication required for extended agent card. (see specification/specification.md#3111-get-extended-agent-card) assert not ['Operation failed: Authentication required for extended agent card.']

testcase.failure: tests\compatibility\core_operations\test_requirements.py:190: in test_must_requirement assert not errors, _format_failure(requirement, transport, errors) E AssertionError: CARD-EXT-002 [Extended card not configured returns specific error] failed on jsonrpc: Operation failed: Authentication required for extended agent card. (see specification/specification.md#3111-get-extended-agent-card) E assert not ['Operation failed: Authentication required for extended agent card.']

testcase.name: test_subscribe_rejects_terminal_task[jsonrpc]

failure.message: AssertionError: STREAM-SUB-003 [SubscribeToTask rejects terminal tasks] failed on jsonrpc: SubscribeToTask on a terminal task should return an error, but succeeded (see specification/specification.md#316-subscribe-to-task)

testcase.failure: tests\compatibility\core_operations\test_task_lifecycle.py:461: in test_subscribe_rejects_terminal_task assert_and_record(compatibility_collector, req, transport, errors) tests\compatibility\_test_helpers.py:59: in assert_and_record assert passed, fail_msg(req, transport, "; ".join(errors)) ^^^^^^ E AssertionError: STREAM-SUB-003 [SubscribeToTask rejects terminal tasks] failed on jsonrpc: SubscribeToTask on a terminal task should return an error, but succeeded (see specification/specification.md#316-subscribe-to-task)

testcase.name: test_subscribe_rejects_terminal_task[http_json]

failure.message: AssertionError: STREAM-SUB-003 [SubscribeToTask rejects terminal tasks] failed on http_json: SubscribeToTask on a terminal task should return an error, but succeeded (see specification/specification.md#316-subscribe-to-task)

testcase.failure: tests\compatibility\core_operations\test_task_lifecycle.py:461: in test_subscribe_rejects_terminal_task assert_and_record(compatibility_collector, req, transport, errors) tests\compatibility\_test_helpers.py:59: in assert_and_record assert passed, fail_msg(req, transport, "; ".join(errors)) ^^^^^^ E AssertionError: STREAM-SUB-003 [SubscribeToTask rejects terminal tasks] failed on http_json: SubscribeToTask on a terminal task should return an error, but succeeded (see specification/specification.md#316-subscribe-to-task)

testcase.name: test_version_not_supported_returns_400

failure.message: Failed: HTTP_JSON-STATUS-001 [A2A errors map to correct HTTP status codes] failed on http_json: Server MUST return VersionNotSupportedError (400) for unsupported A2A-Version, but processed the request normally (see specification/specification.md#54-error-code-mappings)

testcase.failure: tests\compatibility\http_json\test_http_status.py:224: in test_version_not_supported_returns_400 pytest.fail(fail_msg(req, TRANSPORT, detail)) E Failed: HTTP_JSON-STATUS-001 [A2A errors map to correct HTTP status codes] failed on http_json: Server MUST return VersionNotSupportedError (400) for unsupported A2A-Version, but processed the request normally (see specification/specification.md#54-error-code-mappings)

testcase.name: test_content_type_not_supported_error

failure.message: AssertionError: JSONRPC-SSE-002 [A2A error types mapped to correct JSON-RPC error codes] failed on jsonrpc: Error code mismatch: expected ContentTypeNotSupportedError (-32005), got ParseError (-32700) (see specification/specification.md#54-error-code-mappings)

testcase.failure: tests\compatibility\jsonrpc\test_error_codes.py:242: in test_content_type_not_supported_error assert_and_record(compatibility_collector, req, transport, errors) tests\compatibility\_test_helpers.py:59: in assert_and_record assert passed, fail_msg(req, transport, "; ".join(errors)) ^^^^^^ E AssertionError: JSONRPC-SSE-002 [A2A error types mapped to correct JSON-RPC error codes] failed on jsonrpc: Error code mismatch: expected ContentTypeNotSupportedError (-32005), got ParseError (-32700) (see specification/specification.md#54-error-code-mappings)
